metric_name: Weekly PC market trend commentary
metric_value: Been waiting for the high-end Intel Pentium 4 processors to drop to more accessible price points? Well, this week brings some drastic price changes that you'll definitely want to check out.
notes: Kastner market assessment for week of 2003-05-11

metric_name: BestBuy: buying tips for week of 2003-05-11
metric_value: At Best Buy stores this week, save $100 with a rebate on all computer packages. No interest for 12 months continues.

metric_name: Circuit City: buying tips for week of 2003-05-11
metric_value: Save up to $310 on all Desktop Computer Packages and enjoy no interest for 12 months. Circuitcity.com has free shipping on all its online items.

metric_name: CompUSA: buying tips for week of 2003-05-11
metric_value: No weekly advertisements appeared in this week's Boston Globe or Atlanta Journal-Constitution. CompUSA.com tends to continue selling "older" PC models after BestBuy.com and CircuitCity.com have removed them.

metric_name: Dell: buying tips for week of 2003-05-11
metric_value: This week's deals at Dell for the 2350 include a free CD burner in the second bay, a free upgrade to a 60 GB hard drive, and a free upgrade to 256 MB of DDR memory. Dell offers free shipping, hard drive upgrades, and CD burners in the second bay on all its other models.

metric_name: EMachines: buying tips for week of 2003-05-11
metric_value: EMachines has once again revamped its line of models. If you were thinking about buying a T2460, T2042, or T1842, you're now out of luck because these models are gone from all the usual sources we check.

metric_name: Gateway: buying tips for week of 2003-05-11
metric_value: Gateway.com has finally joined the free shipping bandwagon for good. At least that's what we're inferring from its new "Shipping always included" label under the price of any model you configure.

metric_name: Sony: buying tips for week of 2003-05-11
metric_value: Sony.com offers a plethora of models right now, although, like eMachines, the best deals usually come from bundled retail offers. Customizing a PC at Sony Online allows you to eliminate options, such as the "Giga Pocket" Personal Video Recorder, that come standard with retail ...

metric_name: HP and Compaq: buying tips for week of 2003-05-11
